```{r}
setDT(commune_appart)
commune_appart[, .N, by = codgeo] |> count(N)

au2010 <- read_excel(paste0(data_path, "original_data/other/AU2010_au_01-01-2020.xlsx"), skip = 5) %>% clean_names() |> 
  select(au2010, libau2010)
setDT(au2010)
au2010[, .N, by = au2010] %>% count(N)

commune_appart <- commune_appart %>%
  left_join(au2010 %>% select(au2010, au2010_lab = libau2010))

all_enrol_cohort <- all_enrol_cohort |> 
  left_join(commune_appart |> 
              select(comins_clean = codgeo,
                     comins_clean_lab = libgeo,
                     au2010, au2010_lab))

# missing for 9,625 (0.429%) students
all_enrol_cohort |> count(is.na(au2010)) |> count_to_pct()

all_enrol_cohort |> filter(is.na(au2010)) |> count(substr(comins_clean, 1, 2) == "98", sort = T)

# merge back in cohort_09_14
cohort_09_14 <- cohort_09_14 |> 
  left_join(all_enrol_cohort |> 
              select(student_id, compos, comins_clean, au2010, au2010_lab) |> 
              distinct() |> 
              mutate(id = 1:n(), .by = c(student_id, compos)) |> 
              filter(id == 1))

# missing for 9,547 (0.45%) students
cohort_09_14 |>
  filter(enrol_year_bac_all_0914 == T) |>
  count(is.na(au2010)) |> count_to_pct()
```

# High school urban area

```{r}
# missing high school location for 4.24% students
cohort_09_14 <- cohort_09_14 |>
  left_join(etab_all |> 
              select(etabli,
                     hs_cod_commune = code_commune,
                     hs_commune = commune), by = c("cod_eta" = "etabli"))
cohort_09_14 |> count(is.na(hs_cod_commune)) |> count_to_pct()

cohort_09_14 |> filter(is.na(hs_cod_commune)) |> count(cod_eta, sort = T)

cohort_09_14 <- cohort_09_14 |> 
  mutate(hs_commune = case_when(str_detect(hs_commune, "Paris") & substr(hs_cod_commune, 1, 2) == "75" ~ "Paris",
                                str_detect(hs_commune, "Lyon") & substr(hs_cod_commune, 1, 2) == "69" ~ "Paris",
                                str_detect(hs_commune, "Marseille") & substr(hs_cod_commune, 1, 2) == "13" ~ "Marseille",
                                .default = hs_commune))
# obtain high school urban area
cohort_09_14 <- cohort_09_14 |> 
  left_join(commune_appart %>%
              select(hs_cod_commune = codgeo,
                     hs_au2010 = au2010,
                     hs_au2010_lab = au2010_lab))
# missing for about 5% of students
cohort_09_14 |> count(is.na(hs_au2010)) |> count_to_pct()
```

# -----

# Information proxies

```{r}
# number of recipients of aide au mérite per cohort per high school
n_aidemerite_per_hs <- cohort_09_14 %>% 
  group_by(year_bac, cod_eta1) %>% 
  summarise(n_aidemerite = sum(aidemerite_new == T)) %>% 
  ungroup()
n_aidemerite_per_hs %>% count(year_bac, n_aidemerite > 0) %>% count_to_pct()

n_aidemerite_per_hs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_aidemerite)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, center = 0, color = "white", closed = "left") +
  facet_wrap(vars(year_bac))

# how many students came from high schools with at least 1 student who in the current year obtained the aide au mérite
# 57%
cohort_09_14 %>% left_join(n_aidemerite_per_hs) %>% count(n_aidemerite > 1) %>% count_to_pct()

# number of eligible students to aide au mérite per cohort per high school
n_eligible_aidemerite_per_hs <- cohort_09_14 %>% 
  group_by(year_bac, cod_eta1) %>% 
  summarise(n_eligible_aidemerite = sum(mention == "Très Bien" & boursier_esr_all == T)) %>% 
  ungroup()
n_eligible_aidemerite_per_hs %>% count(year_bac, n_eligible_aidemerite > 0) %>% count_to_pct()

n_eligible_aidemerite_per_hs %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n_eligible_aidemerite)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, center = 0, color = "white", closed = "left") +
  facet_wrap(vars(year_bac))

# lag cohort year to obtain number of recipients in previous cohort
# due to this lag the 2009 cohort will have missing values. that's fine, doesn't change much most likely.
setDT(n_aidemerite_per_hs)
n_aidemerite_per_hs[, `:=`(year_bac = year_bac + 1,
                           n_aidemerite_prev_year = n_aidemerite)]

# merge with cohort_09_14
cohort_09_14 <- cohort_09_14 %>% 
  left_join(n_aidemerite_per_hs %>%
              select(cod_eta1, n_aidemerite_prev_year, year_bac)) %>% 
  left_join(n_eligible_aidemerite_per_hs %>% 
              select(cod_eta1, n_eligible_aidemerite, year_bac))
cohort_09_14 %>% count(n_aidemerite_prev_year)
cohort_09_14 %>% count(n_eligible_aidemerite)

# how many students from post-2009 cohorts came from high schools with at least 1 student who in the previous year obtained the aide au mérite
# 67.1%
cohort_09_14[year_bac > 2009] %>% count(n_aidemerite_prev_year >= 1) %>% count_to_pct()

# how many students came from high schools where they were not the only student to be eligible to the aide au mérite
# 59.7%
cohort_09_14 %>% count(n_eligible_aidemerite > 1) %>% count_to_pct()
```

# -----

# Donut

```{r}
# Donut dummy ----
upper = 0.051 # this is so that students scoring exactly at 16.05 are excluded in the donut specification since there is some bunching at this value
lower = .3
cohort_09_14[, donut := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - lower) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut)

cohort_09_14[, donut15 := !(round(moy1,2) >= (15 - lower) & round(moy1,2) < (15 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut15)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 14.5 & moy1 <= 15.1] %>% count(moy1, donut15)

cohort_09_14[, donut14 := !(round(moy1,2) >= (14 - lower) & round(moy1,2) < (14 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut14)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 13.5 & moy1 <= 14.1] %>% count(moy1, donut14)

cohort_09_14[, donut12 := !(round(moy1,2) >= (12 - lower) & round(moy1,2) < (12 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut12)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 11.5 & moy1 <= 12.1] %>% count(moy1, donut12)

# donuts that don't work for appendix
# [15.95, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_a := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .05) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_a)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_a)

# [15.9, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_b := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .1) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_b)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_b)

# [15.85, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_c := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .15) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_c)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_c)

# [15.8, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_d := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .2) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_d)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_d)

# [15.75, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_e := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .25) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_e)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_e)

# [15.65, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_f := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .35) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_f)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_f)

# [15.6, 16.05]
cohort_09_14[, donut_g := !(round(moy1,2) >= (16 - .4) & round(moy1,2) < (16 + upper))]
cohort_09_14 %>% count(donut_g)
cohort_09_14[moy1 >= 15.5 & moy1 <= 16.1] %>% count(moy1, donut_g)
# ----
```

# -----

# Export dataset

```{r}
fwrite(cohort_09_14, here("out/data/cohort_09_14.csv"))
```
